airbnb.title: Get to Know Brasília with a Local
airbnb.subtitle: Discover Brasília through the eyes of someone who lives here. Choose up to 5 experiences from 10 options — we build your tour around you.
airbnb.intro: Instead of a fixed itinerary, you choose what interests you most. When booking, you select up to five experiences from the list. During the tour (3–4 hours), we visit the places you chose and explore them together with your guide — a born-and-raised Brasiliense who speaks fluent English.
includes: Flexible itinerary based on your choices

items.title: Iconic Architecture
items.desc: Cathedral, National Museum, Congress & Praça dos Três Poderes.

items.title: The Power of Brazil
items.desc: Planalto, Supreme Court & the political center of the country.

items.title: Modernist Brasília
items.desc: The Pilot Plan, Lúcio Costa's urban vision & the monumental axis.

items.title: Hidden Brasília
items.desc: Gems, viewpoints & corners that most tourists never see.

items.title: Superquadra Life
items.desc: Daily life in Brasília — local shops, green areas & residential architecture.

items.title: Art & Culture
items.desc: Cultural centers, the National Museum & public art across the city.

items.title: Best Views
items.desc: The most beautiful viewpoints of the city and Lake Paranoá.

items.title: Lakeside Brasília
items.desc: The relaxed side of the city near Lake Paranoá — how locals unwind.

items.title: Food & Coffee Break
items.desc: A local café or bakery stop — Brazilian coffee, snacks & real conversation.

items.title: Architecture Deep Dive
items.desc: For enthusiasts: a deeper look at Niemeyer's design concepts and legacy.

native.title: Get to Know Brasília with a Native
native.subtitle: Brasília is famous for being hard to explore on your own. The best spots — where locals actually eat, hang out, and spend their weekends — don't show up in guidebooks. We take you there.

valueProps.title: No tourist traps
valueProps.desc: We skip the overpriced, overcrowded spots and take you where people actually go.

valueProps.title: Built around you
valueProps.desc: Tell us your vibe and we design the experience on the fly — nothing is fixed in advance.

valueProps.title: Genuinely unique
valueProps.desc: No two experiences are the same. This one will be yours.

vibes.title: Street Food
vibes.desc: Pastelarias, food trucks & the kind of lunch spots only regulars know about.

vibes.title: Music & Nightlife
vibes.desc: Live forró, bars in the 405 Sul, and whatever is happening tonight.

vibes.title: Nature
vibes.desc: Cerrado trails, wild orchids & places where the city just disappears.

vibes.title: Art
vibes.desc: Street murals, gallery openings & the public installations most people walk past.

vibes.title: Neighborhoods
vibes.desc: Walk through a superquadra, visit a feira & feel what real life here is like.

vibes.title: Sports
vibes.desc: From paddle courts to a Brasiliense match — the city's sporting soul.

vibes.title: Hidden History
vibes.desc: The stories behind the construction — the candangos, the city's forgotten origins.

vibes.title: Sunsets & Views
vibes.desc: The best sunset spots in the city — some so beautiful they don't feel real.
